name: Triple Caress Chocolate Mocha Chocolate Chip
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Best quality semisweet chocolate chips (such as Ghiradelli)
6 to 8 oz Pecans or Walnuts (chop, toast, optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine butter, vegetable shortening, and semisweet chocolate in a small saucepan. Heat over low medium until all ingredients are uniformly melted, stirring occasionally. Remove from heat and stir again to smooth; let cool to room temperature.
3. In a separate bowl, whip eggs at medium high speed for 5 minutes. Gradually add brown sugar and white sugar while continuing to beat.
4. Prepare coffee concentrate by placing decaf crystals in a small bowl and pouring boiling water over it, stirring to dissolve. Stir in vanilla extract.
5. Once eggs and sugar are well beaten, gently fold in the coffee concentrate mixture, followed by the melted chocolate mixture. Beat for an additional 2 minutes.
6. In another bowl, combine flour, baking powder, salt, and unsweetened cocoa. Stir until combined.
7. Gently fold the dry ingredient mixture into the chocolate batter by hand.
8. Finally, stir in chocolate chips and optional nuts.
9. Line two double insulated cookie sheets with parchment paper.
10. For small cookies (about 3 inches in diameter), drop rounded teaspoons of batter onto prepared sheets about 2 inches apart.
11. For large cookies (about 6 to 8 inches in diameter), scoop the batter using a 2-1/2-inch ice cream scoop (3/8 cup capacity). Place 2 to 3 large cookies per sheet; no need to "splat" them with your hand as they will spread while baking.
12. Bake small cookies for about 10 minutes and large cookies for about 20 minutes. Allow cookies to cool on sheets for 1 minute before transferring to a rack.
Yield: Approximately 33 (3") cookies or 15 (6") cookies.
